briefdescription.para: This function is used to check if the watchdog has timed-out and the last reset was caused by the watchdog reset.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XScuWdt instance.

listitem.para: TRUE if the watchdog has expired.
FALSE if the watchdog has not expired.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to check if the watchdog counter has reached 0 in timer mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XScuWdt instance.

listitem.para: TRUE if the watchdog has expired.
FALSE if the watchdog has not expired.

detaileddescription.para: This macro will read the watchdog load register and write the same value to load register to update the counter register. An application needs to call this function periodically to keep the watchdog from asserting the WDRESETREQ reset request output pin.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XScuWdt instance.

briefdescription.para: Write to the watchdog timer load register.

detaileddescription.para: This will also update the watchdog counter register with the new value. This macro can be used to change the time-out value.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XScuWdt instance.
is the value to be written to the Watchdog Load register.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XScuWdt_LoadWdt(XScuWdt *InstancePtr, u32 Value)

briefdescription.para: Put the watchdog timer in Watchdog mode by setting the WD mode bit of the Watchdog control register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XScuWdt instance.

briefdescription.para: Put the watchdog timer in Timer mode by writing 0x12345678 and 0x87654321 successively to the Watchdog Disable Register.

detaileddescription.para: The software must write 0x12345678 and 0x87654321 successively to the Watchdog Disable Register so that the watchdog mode bit in the Watchdog Control Register is set to zero.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XScuWdt instance.

briefdescription.para: Get the contents of the watchdog control register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XScuWdt instance.

simplesect.para: Contents of the watchdog control register.

briefdescription.para: Write to the watchdog control register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XScuWdt instance.
is the value to be written to the watchdog control register.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XScuWdt_SetControlReg(XScuWdt *InstancePtr, u32 ControlReg)

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XScuWdt instance.

briefdescription.para: This table contains configuration information for each watchdog timer device in the system.
Looks up the device configuration based on the unique device ID/BaseAddress.

detaileddescription.para: The XScuWdt_ConfigTable[] contains the configuration info for each device in the system.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device

simplesect.para: A pointer to the configuration found or NULL if the specified device ID/BaseAddress was not found. See xscuwdt.h for the definition of XScuWdt_Config.
In XSCT/classic flow, DeviceId is used to look up the device configuration.

briefdescription.para: Run a self-test on the WDT.

detaileddescription.para: This test stops the watchdog, writes a value to the watchdog load register, starts the watchdog and verifies that the value read from the counter register is less that the value written to the load register. It then restores the control register and the watchdog load register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XScuWdt instance.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if the WDT is not decrementing.

briefdescription.para: Initialize a specific watchdog timer instance/driver.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called before other functions of the driver are called.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XScuWdt instance.
is the base address for the device. It could be a virtual address if address translation is supported in the system, otherwise it is the physical address.

listitem.para: XST_DEVICE_IS_STARTED if the device has already been started.

simplesect.para: This function enables the watchdog mode.

briefdescription.para: Start the watchdog counter of the device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XScuWdt instance.

simplesect.para: User needs to select the appropriate mode (watchdog/timer) before using this API. See XScuWdt_SetWdMode/XScuWdt_SetTimerMode macros in xscuwdt.h.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XScuWdt instance.
